**Source:** `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  
**Last updated:** 2026-03-28

### Dosing summary
| Patient | Weight | Dose | Calculated dose | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|
| CU-001 | 12.4 kg | 0.15 mg/kg | **1.86 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 mL/min |
| CU-002 | 9.1 kg | 0.12 mg/kg | **1.09 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 mL/min |
| CU-003 | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | **2.83 mg** | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min |

### Clinical notes
- **CU-001:** Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan.
- **CU-002:** Responding well; weight gain improving.
- **CU-003:** New enrollment; first dose administered 2026-03-27.

### PK model stability
From the dosing config, everything looks **internally consistent**: all three patients have complete PK-linked dosing parameters and nothing obvious looks off in the file.

That said, this file alone doesn’t confirm **live model/runtime stability**—just that the current dosing parameters are populated and coherent. If you want, I can do a follow-up check on monitoring outputs/logs for a firmer PK stability readout.
